query:
SELECT s.id, s.externalId, s.serviceId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.dataSource,
       s.customerExternalId, s.customerName as svcCustomerName, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'Channel Haus'
  AND (s.isUnbillable = 0 OR s.isUnbillable IS NULL)
ORDER BY c.name, s.serviceId
LIMIT 50;

       s.customerExternalId, s.customerName as svcCustomerName, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'Channel Haus'
  AND (s.isUnbillable = 0 OR s.isUnbillable IS NULL)
ORDER BY c.name, s.serviceId
